programme.title: My Family 3
programme.desc: Ben (Robert Lindsay) and Susan (Zoë Wanamaker) Harper are a middle-class couple living in the Chiswick district of London.Their three children live with them: Nick (Kris Marshall), Janey (Daniela Denby-Ashe) and Michael (Gabriel Thomson).Ben is a dentist who values ​​peace and quiet.Susan makes all the important decisions in the family.She works in London as a tour guide and has a hard time adapting to the stereotype of a woman cooking dinner for her husband.The eldest son, Nick, is not very bright, has problems finding a permanent job and spends most of his time in front of the TV.Janey is only interested in clothes and boys, and the youngest, Michael, is an intelligent boy and the mascot of the whole family.He doesn't find a common language with his father, but spends all day in front of the computer.

credits.actor: Inspector Eve Dunlop - Tara Lynne O'Neill

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The further fate of Father Brown, who solves subsequent puzzles using his innate intuition and acquired psychological knowledge.In his work, he uses the experience gained over many years of service.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries 3
programme.desc: War veteran Dr. Lucien Blake (played by Craig McLachlan) returns to his hometown.He begins to support the local police in solving crimes.

credits.actor: Chief Supt Matthew Lawson - Joel Tobeck

programme.title: My Life is Murder 2
programme.desc: The second season of the series.Alexa Crowe (Lucy Lawless) supports the charismatic Inspector Harry (Rawiri Jobe) and his partner Madison (Ebony Vagulans) in solving difficult crimes.

credits.actor: Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey - Bernard Curry

programme.title: My Life is Murder 2
programme.desc: The second season of the series.Alexa Crowe (Lucy Lawless) supports the charismatic Inspector Harry (Rawiri Jobe) and his partner Madison (Ebony Vagulans) in solving difficult crimes.

credits.actor: Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey - Bernard Curry

programme.title: Lewis 8
programme.desc: Detective Lewis (Kevin Whately) and Sergeant Hathaway (Laurence Fox) cooperate and together conduct various, sometimes very difficult, criminal investigations.

programme.title: Father Brown 9
programme.desc: Another season of the series in which the charismatic priest, Father Brown (Mark Williams), investigates various criminal mysteries.They take place in the parish of Kembleford.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The next fate of the British commissioner, Richard Poole (Ben Miller).The officer is sent to one of the Caribbean islands, where he works to investigate the circumstances of local murders.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries 3
programme.desc: War veteran Dr. Lucien Blake (played by Craig McLachlan) returns to his hometown.He begins to support the local police in solving crimes.

credits.actor: Chief Supt Matthew Lawson - Joel Tobeck

programme.title: London Kills 2
programme.desc: The further fate of officers from an elite London unit that deals with solving mysterious murders.

programme.desc: The further fate of officers from an elite London unit that deals with solving mysterious murders.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The further fate of Father Brown, who solves subsequent puzzles using his innate intuition and acquired psychological knowledge.In his work, he uses the experience gained over many years of service.

programme.title: Lewis 8
programme.desc: Detective Lewis (Kevin Whately) and Sergeant Hathaway (Laurence Fox) cooperate and together conduct various, sometimes very difficult, criminal investigations.

programme.title: My Life is Murder 2
programme.desc: The second season of the series.Alexa Crowe (Lucy Lawless) supports the charismatic Inspector Harry (Rawiri Jobe) and his partner Madison (Ebony Vagulans) in solving difficult crimes.

credits.actor: Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey - Bernard Curry

programme.title: Midsomer Murders 10
programme.desc: The action of the series takes place in England, in the area known as Midsomer.Among the eccentric inhabitants of one of the local towns there are Chief Inspector Tom Barnaby (John Nettles), husband Joyce (Jane Wymark) and father Cully (Laura Howard), who are calm and composed in tracking down crimes.He is assisted by his junior assistant, Sergeant Gavin Troy (Daniel Casey).Detectives work together to solve complicated murder cases taking place in various nearby towns.The creators of the series were inspired by a series of books by the English writer Caroline Graham.In the seventh series, instead of Troy, Tom's new partner becomes Sergeant Dan Scott (John Hopkins), and in the ninth series - Sergeant Ben Jones (Jason Hughes).

credits.actor: Joyce Barnaby, żona Toma - Jane Wymark
sierżant Ben Jones, partner Barnaby'ego - Jason Hughes

programme.title: Midsomer Murders 10
programme.desc: The action of the series takes place in England, in the area known as Midsomer.Among the eccentric inhabitants of one of the local towns there are Chief Inspector Tom Barnaby (John Nettles), husband Joyce (Jane Wymark) and father Cully (Laura Howard), who are calm and composed in tracking down crimes.He is assisted by his junior assistant, Sergeant Gavin Troy (Daniel Casey).Detectives work together to solve complicated murder cases taking place in various nearby towns.The creators of the series were inspired by a series of books by the English writer Caroline Graham.In the seventh series, instead of Troy, Tom's new partner becomes Sergeant Dan Scott (John Hopkins), and in the ninth series - Sergeant Ben Jones (Jason Hughes).

credits.actor: Joyce Barnaby, żona Toma - Jane Wymark
sierżant Ben Jones, partner Barnaby'ego - Jason Hughes

programme.desc: The next fate of the British commissioner, Richard Poole (Ben Miller).The officer is sent to one of the Caribbean islands, where he works to investigate the circumstances of local murders.

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Dr. Nikki Alexander and her team of pathologists return with new crime cases.Using the achievements of science and the possibilities of a modern laboratory, they will once again face difficult puzzles.

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Dr. Nikki Alexander and her team of pathologists return with new crime cases.Using the achievements of science and the possibilities of a modern laboratory, they will once again face difficult puzzles.

programme.title: Father Brown 13
programme.desc: 1950s.Father Brown, a priest from the parish of Kembleford, solves complex crimes.He uses intuition and psychological knowledge to lead sinners to the right path.
